name: grove-fit
description: Grove Fit — hardware fit for local AI (Boske Labs)

scripts.test: bun run --filter '@boske-labs/*' test && bun run --filter 'grove-fit-cli' test
scripts.build: bun run --filter '@boske-labs/grove-fit-core' build && bun run --filter '@boske-labs/grove-fit-detect' build && bun run --filter '@boske-labs/grove-fit-ui' build && bun run --filter 'grove-fit-cli' build
